resources.string: MT Auto Clicker uses Accessibility to perform user-configured taps, gestures, and macro navigation. During macro recording it can inspect the active window and focused text field to capture actions you request. Accessibility content is processed on your device and is not sold or shared.
Allow MT Auto Clicker to show the floating control bar while you automate other apps.
Enable MT Auto Clicker under Accessibility so it can perform actions you configure.

MT Auto Clicker uses Android Accessibility to perform taps, swipes, and Back/Home/Recents actions that you explicitly configure. During macro recording it can inspect the active window and focused text field to capture the actions you request.

Accessibility content is processed on your device. It is not sold, shared, or used for advertising. The service does not autonomously make decisions, and automation stops when you press Stop.

You can decline now and enable the service later from Permissions.
